vulnerability.reference: Enterprises' confidential fine-tuning data can be extracted, compromising trade secrets and sensitive internal knowledge.
vulnerability.generated: Enterprises assume fine-tuned weights are irretrievable, but low-rank LoRA updates enable exact pre-fine-tuning weight reconstruction.

impact.reference: Competitive disadvantage and trade secret loss.
impact.generated: Confidential enterprise documents and proprietary model internals are exposed, causing intellectual property loss and potential regulatory violations.

dose_response.reference: Spectral DeTuning enables weight extraction, which in fine-tuned Mistral LLMs integrated into enterprise applications exposes enterprises that fine-tuned on confidential documents, leading to trade secret loss and legal liability.
dose_response.generated: Spectral DeTuning, through enterprises fine-tuning on confidential documents, exploits the false assumption that fine-tuned weights are irretrievable, recovering pre-fine-tuning weights to expose confidential data and proprietary internals, causing intellectual property loss and regulatory violations.
